question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. To initiate a return, go to your Order History and select 'Return Item'. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned item.

question: How can I track my order?
answer: You can track your order by logging into your account and visiting the 'Order History' section. Click on the order number to see real-time tracking information. You will also receive email updates with tracking links when your order ships.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

question: How long does shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping takes 2-3 business days. Overnight shipping is available for orders placed before 2 PM EST. Free standard shipping is available on orders over $50.

question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner of our website. Enter your email address, create a password, and fill in your shipping details. You can also sign up using your Google or Facebook account for faster registration.

question: What is your product warranty?
answer: All electronics come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Extended warranty plans (2 or 3 years) are available for purchase at checkout. Warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship but does not cover accidental damage.

question: How do I apply a discount or coupon code?
answer: Enter your coupon code in the 'Promo Code' field at checkout and click 'Apply'. The discount will be reflected in your order total. Only one coupon code can be used per order. Coupons cannot be combined with other promotions.

question: How can I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us via email at support@shopexample.com, by phone at 1-800-555-0199 (Mon-Fri 9AM-6PM EST), or through our live chat feature on the website. Average response time for emails is 24 hours.

question: What are your business hours?
answer: Our customer support team is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Standard Time. Our online store is open 24/7 for browsing and placing orders.

question: Do you have a size guide?
answer: Yes! You can find our detailed size guide on each product page under the 'Size Guide' tab. We provide measurements in both inches and centimeters. If you're between sizes, we recommend ordering the larger size for a comfortable fit.

question: Can I purchase gift cards?
answer: Yes, we offer digital gift cards in denominations of $25, $50, $100, and $200. Gift cards are delivered via email and never expire. They can be used for any purchase on our website.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: To cancel your subscription, go to Account Settings > Subscriptions and click 'Cancel Subscription'. You will retain access until the end of your current billing period. No cancellation fees apply.

question: Do you offer international shipping?
answer: Yes, we ship to over 50 countries worldwide. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days. Customs duties and taxes may apply depending on your country. Shipping costs are calculated at checkout.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email address. You will receive a password reset link within a few minutes. The link expires after 24 hours for security purposes.

question: Can I change or cancel my order after placing it?
answer: You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it by visiting Order History and selecting 'Modify Order'. Once the order has been shipped, it cannot be cancelled but you can initiate a return after delivery.
